body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46764", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "The Event Log detail endpoint `GET /api/v2/eventLogs/{event_log_id}` in Apache Airflow fetched audit-log rows directly by numeric ID after only the generic Audit Log permission check, while the collection endpoint `GET /api/v2/eventLogs` applied per-Dag scoping. An authenticated UI/API user with audit-log read permission for one Dag could retrieve audit-log entries for any other Dag by guessing or enumerating the numeric event log ID. Affects deployments that rely on per-Dag audit-log scoping. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00352, "percentile": 0.26929}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qphr-3mvq-v466", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T21:03:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qphr-3mvq-v466", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qphr-3mvq-v466"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46764"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:15Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46764", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/67112", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/ctrbj7q3m86g4qxmo9ponojgmzrcoqpv", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/31/14", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qphr-3mvq-v466"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow has an Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T21:03:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qphr-3mvq-v466", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow has an Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key
